title: Normal numbers with given limits of multiple ergodic averages
abstract: We are interested in the set of normal sequences in the space $\{0,1\}^\mathbb{N}$ with a given frequency of the pattern $11$ in the positions $k, 2k$. The topological entropy of such sets is determined.
comment: 20 pages. A section Preliminary is added. More details of the proofs are given
